verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend950PR_9599, verification passed

notes: Golden kernel verified on CANN 9.0.0 simulator (Ascend950PR_9599 / C310 / arch35) in Docker. Two-kernel + host-dispatcher structure mirroring CANN's KernelRmsNormRegBase (full_row, tiling key 5000) and KernelRmsNormRegBaseSplitD (split_d, tiling key 2001) from opp/built-in/op_impl/ai_core/tbe/impl/ops_nn/ascendc/rms_norm/rms_norm.cpp. Inputs are torch.Tensor (numpy is silently zeroed on C310). The dispatcher picks full_row when num_cols * dtype_bytes <= 64KB and num_cols % 8 == 0, else split_d (tile_cols=64 streaming + host padding). Test shapes (8, 256) for full_row and (8, 1055) for split_d are both verified in a single run_kernel call. Tolerances atol=rtol=1e-4 for both branches.
